title: Extract Attachments
metaDescription: Extract embedded files from PDFs. Download all attachments from PDF documents.
description:
Extract Attachments retrieves all embedded files from PDF documents. Download attachments individually or as a ZIP archive containing all files.

Perfect for accessing source files, data, or supplementary materials embedded in PDF packages.

All extraction happens in your browser, ensuring your documents remain private.

howToUse.title: Upload Your PDF
howToUse.description: Drag and drop your PDF file or click to select.

howToUse.title: View Attachments
howToUse.description: See a list of all embedded files in the PDF.

howToUse.title: Extract and Download
howToUse.description: Download individual files or all as a ZIP.

useCases.title: Access Source Files
useCases.description: Extract original data files from PDF reports.

useCases.title: Recover Attachments
useCases.description: Retrieve embedded files from PDF packages.

useCases.title: Batch Extraction
useCases.description: Extract attachments from multiple PDFs at once.

faq.question: What if there are no attachments?
faq.answer: The tool will indicate if no embedded files are found.

faq.question: Are all attachment types supported?
faq.answer: Yes, all embedded file types can be extracted.

faq.question: Can I extract from multiple PDFs?
faq.answer: Yes, you can process multiple PDFs and download all attachments.
